name: ANAPTYSBIO, INC
summary: AnaptysBio is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on immunology therapeutics for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Its pipeline includes rosnilimab (pathogenic T cell depleter for rheumatoid arthritis), ANB033 (CD122 antagonist for celiac disease and eosinophilic esophagitis), and ANB101 (BDCA2 modulator). The company also out-licensed dostarlimab (Jemperli) to GSK and imsidolimab to Vanda Pharmaceuticals, generating milestone and royalty revenue.

products.name: Rosnilimab
products.description: IgG1 antibody targeting pathogenic T cells for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, including rheumatoid arthritis; completed Phase 2b trial.

products.name: ANB033
products.description: CD122 antagonist in Phase 1b trial for celiac disease and eosinophilic esophagitis.

products.name: ANB101
products.description: BDCA2 modulator in Phase 1a trial for inflammatory diseases.

products.name: Jemperli (dostarlimab-gxly)
products.description: PD-1 antagonist out-licensed to GSK; generates milestone and royalty revenue for AnaptysBio.

products.name: Imsidolimab
products.description: IL-36R antagonist out-licensed to Vanda Pharmaceuticals; generates license and transition services revenue.

partnerships.description: Out-licensed PD-1 antagonist Jemperli (dostarlimab); AnaptysBio receives milestones and royalties from immuno-oncology collaboration.
Out-licensed IL-36R antagonist imsidolimab; AnaptysBio receives license and transition services revenue.
